title: Verify Engagement section shows personalized content based on consumption level
description: Test that Engagement section shows acquired content for users below 90% consumption, and similar genre recommendations for users above 90%

steps.description: 1. Login as user with active trial and consumption < 90%
4. For another user with consumption >= 90%, observe Engagement section

expected_result: Users < 90% consumption see acquired content. Users >= 90% see top 1 content in similar genre with trailer auto-play option
